parameters.name: RUNS_ON_AGENT
parameters.description: Display only: this Job is fixed to its configured Jenkins agent label.

parameters.name: PLATFORM
parameters.description: Release pipeline target platform.

parameters.name: CHANNEL_IDS
parameters.description: Channel option. The first field is passed to the release pipeline.

parameters.name: BUILD_ALL_CHANNELS_FOR_PLATFORM
parameters.description: Build all channels configured for the selected PLATFORM.

parameters.name: CDN_NAME
parameters.description: CDN configuration name.

parameters.name: BUILD_RESOURCES
parameters.description: Build AssetBundles and hotfix resources.

parameters.name: FULL_RESOURCE_BUILD
parameters.description: Use full resource build mode.

parameters.name: BUILD_APP
parameters.description: Build player or WeChat Mini Game output.

parameters.name: DIRECT_PUBLISH_TO_CDN
parameters.description: Directly upload publish output to CDN.

parameters.name: PUBLISH_RESOURCES
parameters.description: Publish resource files.

parameters.name: PUBLISH_CATALOG
parameters.description: Publish the resource catalog.

parameters.name: PUBLISH_APP_MANIFEST
parameters.description: Publish the app manifest.

parameters.name: DRY_RUN
parameters.description: Validate the pipeline without building or uploading.

parameters.name: SKIP_UPLOAD
parameters.description: Prepare publish manifests but skip CDN upload.

parameters.name: CONFIRM_UPLOAD
parameters.description: Required before a real direct CDN upload.

parameters.name: RUN_COMPILE_CHECK
parameters.description: Run Unity compile check before the release pipeline.

parameters.name: ALLOW_MODIFIED_SVN_WORKING_COPY
parameters.description: Allow a modified SVN working copy only for DryRun.

parameters.name: SVN_UPDATE_WORKING_COPY
parameters.description: Update the clean SVN working copy before building.

parameters.name: SVN_REVISION
parameters.description: Optional numeric SVN revision. Empty uses repository head.

parameters.name: REGISTER_GAMEADMIN_BUILD
parameters.description: Register a successful non-DryRun build in GameAdmin.

parameters.name: GAMEADMIN_URL
parameters.description: GameAdmin backend base URL.
